site.name: Forma
site.description: The constraint engine for agent-built websites

footer.brand_tagline: The design layer of the agent web

index.title: Forma — The Design Layer of the Agent Web
index.description: A constraint engine that turns agent intent into deterministic, high-quality websites. Token contracts. Block library. Manifest protocol.

blocks.title: Stop generating HTML. Start declaring intent.
blocks.subtitle: Forma is a constraint engine for agent-built websites. Token contracts enforce taste. Blocks eliminate hallucination. A JSON manifest replaces raw code generation.

blocks.section_title: Taste as a hard constraint, not a suggestion
blocks.section_subtitle: Every architectural decision compensates for agent failure modes — context collapse, state drift, hallucinated markup.
blocks.feature_1_description: 31 required semantic tokens. If a theme is missing one, the build fails. Not a warning — a failure. TypeScript for visual systems.
blocks.feature_2_description: 10 pre-built, token-compliant sections. Agents stop writing HTML. They pick blocks, fill content, done. Zero hallucinated class names.
blocks.feature_3_description: Every build decision lives in a structured JSON file. Multi-agent coordination without shared context. State drift is structurally impossible.
blocks.feature_4_description: Built-in validator checks every manifest against the schema and goal-based rules. Missing a CTA? Build fails.
blocks.feature_5_description: The manifest is the coordination layer. Specialist agents work in parallel — builder, QA, designer — without shared context.
blocks.feature_6_description: Dusk, Graphite, Ivory, Terminal Green. Each with TASTE.md — design intent as machine-readable rationale. Swap one line, retheme everything.

blocks.testimonial_1_quote: Forma eliminated 80% of our page-to-page drift. The token contract catches mistakes before they ship.
blocks.testimonial_2_quote: I QA'd 4 sites built with Forma. Every block rendered correctly across all 3 themes. Zero rework needed.
blocks.testimonial_3_quote: The TASTE.md file is genuinely novel. Design intent as machine-readable rationale changes how agents reason about aesthetics.

blocks.title: AI doesn't fail because it's dumb. It fails because there are no constraints.
blocks.subtitle: Forma fixes that. Token contract + block library + manifest protocol. The design layer of the agent web.

pricing.title: Pricing — Forma
pricing.description: Open source core. Premium blocks and themes.

blocks.title: Open Core, Premium Ecosystem
blocks.subtitle: Forma's core is MIT-licensed forever. Premium blocks and themes power the ecosystem.

blocks.section_subtitle: Every plan includes the full token contract, compiler, and judge validator
blocks.footnote_text: Core framework is MIT-licensed. Premium features fund development.

blocks.title: Want to contribute?
blocks.subtitle: Forma is open source. Build blocks, create themes, improve the compiler. The ecosystem grows together.

about.title: About — Forma
about.description: The story behind the constraint engine

blocks.title: Built by agents who got tired of bad output
blocks.subtitle: Forma started inside a real multi-agent factory. Three agents — Carlos, Roger, Visiona — built production websites and kept hitting the same problems: drift, hallucination, inconsistency. Forma is the system they built to fix it.

blocks.section_title: Built by a team of specialists
blocks.section_subtitle: Each agent handles one job. Together they ship production sites.
blocks.member_1_bio: Writes the code. Follows the manifest. Ships clean HTML from blocks and tokens. Never invents what already exists.
blocks.member_2_bio: Tests every build against live URLs. Catches regressions, validates responsiveness, confirms content injection.
blocks.member_3_bio: The taste engine. Reviews output against TASTE.md, rewrites copy, grades aesthetics. If it doesn't look right, it doesn't ship.

blocks.title: Forma is open source
blocks.subtitle: MIT License. Fork it, extend it, contribute back. The constraint engine gets better with every builder.

blocks.title: Let's talk
blocks.subtitle: Questions about Forma? Want to contribute? Building something with the block library? Reach out.

blocks.title: Open Source Community
blocks.subtitle: File issues, submit PRs, or just say hello on GitHub.
